templates.name: Equities Static Universe
templates.description: Simple template with a fixed list of assets, indicators, and a scheduled event.

templates.name: Equities Universe
templates.description: Fundamental universe selecting top undervalued large-caps ranked by an EMA100/EMA300 cross, rebalanced daily.

templates.name: Chained Universe
templates.description: Chains an ETF-constituents universe (QQQ) into a fundamental PE filter to select the most undervalued stocks.

templates.name: History and ETF Universe
templates.description: Selects QQQ constituents, ranks them by a daily ATR, and rebalances using ETF weights.

templates.name: Intraday Indicator Scans
templates.description: Scans QQQ constituents every 15 minutes with a minute-resolution ATR to select the most volatile constituents intraday.

templates.name: Custom Indicator
templates.description: Implements a custom Money Flow Index indicator and trades SPY on its signals.

templates.name: Custom Consolidators
templates.description: Builds a calendar-based QuoteBar consolidator anchored to 5 PM ET, applies an EMA on the consolidated Forex bars, and trades crossovers.

templates.name: Custom Data
templates.description: Defines a custom data source type that ingests Bitstamp data and plots daily Bitcoin prices.

templates.name: Custom Data with Ticker Mapping
templates.description: Loads custom data tied to an Equity whose ticker changed (FB to META) using point-in-time SecurityIdentifier mapping from the Object Store.

templates.name: Custom Models
templates.description: Replaces the default fee, fill, slippage, and buying-power models through a security initializer.

templates.name: Forex
templates.description: Trades three Forex pairs using a Minimum indicator on the bid-ask spread to enter when spreads are tightest.

templates.name: CFD
templates.description: Trades CFDs across German, Asian, and US index markets with Scheduled Events aligned to each market's hours.

templates.name: Crypto Static Universe
templates.description: Trades a fixed list of Cryptocurrencies on Bitfinex at minute resolution with a weekly rebalance.

templates.name: Crypto Universe
templates.description: Selects the top 10 Cryptos by USD volume on Coinbase and rebalances daily at noon.

templates.name: Crypto Futures
templates.description: Trades Crypto Futures (BTC, ETH, LTC) on Binance margin in USDT with weekly rebalancing and margin-interest tracking.

templates.name: Futures
templates.description: Trades the continuous E-mini SP 500 Future and rolls between contract months on SymbolChangedEvents.

templates.name: Equity Options Static
templates.description: Trades a fixed SPY Equity Option chain, constructing and rebalancing a covered call on a weekly schedule.

templates.name: Equity Options Universe
templates.description: Filters SPY weekly Equity Options to ATM calls and puts and executes a long straddle.

templates.name: Index Options Static
templates.description: Trades SPX Index Options, buying the ATM contract with the closest expiration.

templates.name: Index Options Universe
templates.description: Filters the SPXW Index Option chain to 0DTE strikes near ATM and buys the call with the lower strike.

templates.name: Intraday Index Options Selection
templates.description: Loads the SPX weekly chain daily and re-filters ATM calls every 5 minutes to trade as contracts update intraday.

templates.name: Intraday Greeks-Based Options Selection
templates.description: Selects RUT Index Options intraday by target delta from EMA-driven signals with paced order submission.

templates.name: Future Options
templates.description: Builds a bull call spread on E-mini SP500 Future Options.

templates.name: Alternative Data
templates.description: Ranks Equities with the Brain ML Ranking dataset and sizes positions from predicted returns via portfolio targets.

templates.name: Alternative Data Universe
templates.description: Uses EODHD upcoming-earnings data to select Equities and trades straddles around earnings announcements.

templates.name: AI
templates.description: Trains a TensorFlow MLP weekly on warmed-up history to predict SPY direction.

templates.name: Trade Management
templates.description: Implements a One-Cancels-Other (OCO) pattern with a market order entry and paired stop-loss and take-profit orders, where one of the paired orders cancels when the other fills.

templates.name: Financial Advisors
templates.description: Demonstrates Interactive Brokers Financial Advisor group/account allocations via order properties along with live brokerage messages.

templates.name: Live Trading Features
templates.description: Demonstrates live email and SMS notifications, brokerage disconnect/reconnect handling, and commands.
